emails.subject: Direct Mail Pack Letter
emails.body: Direct Mail Pack Letter Louise Could you review and approve the attached draft of the cover letter for the direct mail pack? The letter will be sent under your name. I will come by tomorrow to get your signature on a piece of paper. We will scan it and print on the letter electronically. Thanks Kal

emails.subject: RE: Direct Mail Pack Letter
emails.body: RE: Direct Mail Pack Letter Can you redraft in light of how I redrafted the other one removing Enron's name from the first paragraph. And resend to me Thanks To: Kitchen, Louise

emails.subject: RE: Direct Mail Pack Letter
emails.body: I've redrafted it. See attached. Thanks. Kal To: Shah, Kal

emails.subject: RE: Direct Mail Pack Letter
emails.body: Great no changes To: Kitchen, Louise
